0.text: Parenchymal fibrosis in the right lung lower lobe superior segment

1.text: Cystic bronchiectasis leading to volume loss and structural distortion in the right lung lower lobe superior segment

2.text: Bronchiectatic changes in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe and the lingular segment of the left lung

4.text: Nonspecific pulmonary nodules in both lungs, largest measuring 4 mm in diameter in the right middle lobe
